subcodes.title: Du’a’a’l-Vajib (fi kull laylat-i-jum'ah)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my Lord! I beseech Thee, by Thy Divinity which transcendeth all things, to aid every soul who believeth in Him Whom Thou shalt make manifest on the Day of Resurrection, the Day of Thy Most Great Testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم رب لاسئلنک بالوهیتک التی انها هی ممتنعة فوق کل شیء ان تنصرن کل ذات الف یومن بمن تظهرنه یوم القیامة ذات حجتک العظمی
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God
